Uses of Interface
recoder.Service

Packages that use Service
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.io
The io package provides classes to import and export source and class files.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ClassFileRepository
    Retrieval and storage of parsed bytecode files.
    interface 
    SourceFileRepository
    Retrieval, storage and write back of abstract syntax trees.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultClassFileRepository
     
    class 
    DefaultSourceFileRepository
     
    class 
    ProjectSettings
    The project settings object manages global properties such as search and output paths, and options for the pretty printer and can save and load a textual representation of these informations.

  • Uses of Service in recoder.service

    Subinterfaces of Service in recoder.service
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ByteCodeInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with bytecode representations.
    interface 
    ConstantEvaluator
    Constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.
    interface 
    CrossReferenceSourceInfo
    Source information service supporting cross reference information.
    interface 
    ImplicitElementInfo
    Handles requests for implicitly defined program model elements.
    interface 
    NameInfo
    Manages the global name mapping.
    interface 
    ProgramModelInfo
    The program model info computes predicates for program model elements contained in recoder.abstraction.
    interface 
    SourceInfo
    Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.
    Classes in recoder.service that implement Service
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChangeHistory
    Keeps records on the syntactical changes that occured after the last validation of the model.

    Easy constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.

    Implements queries for cross referencing.

    Handles requests for implicitely defined program model elements.
